title: 5 disciplines a godly man builds before anyone notices
caption:
God sees the work no one applauds.

The discipline you build in secret — the alarm you actually keep, the passage you read slow, the conversation you stopped avoiding — that's the formation nobody watches and everybody eventually feels.

Most guys want the fruit without the root. They want to be trusted before they've built the habits worth trusting. That's not how it works.

The 20s aren't for performing. They're for building. And almost all of the real building happens when nobody's watching.

Here are 5 disciplines worth building in the hidden hours:

1. Show up before you feel ready. The morning is a test — govern it.
2. Read like it was written for you. One passage. Ask what it requires.
3. Address the thing you keep avoiding. Go first. That's what leaders do.
4. Stewardship, not vanity. The body God gave you isn't yours to neglect.
5. Two or three real ones. Not followers. Men who know your sin and show up.

— Proverbs 27:17

Build in secret. Become in public.

—

Comment "build" and I'll send you the link to ETHOS.
